rationale.R1.1: The artifact contains a structurally unusual contribution claim — DialogueDev is introduced as the subject but RSP is revealed as the central contribution. Any substantive review must reconstruct and assess this thesis positioning and gap statement.
rationale.R1.2: There is a salient internal tension: the paper is framed as a multi-agent protocol paper yet its own Section 5 argues that prompting strategy, not communication topology, dominates variance. Checking whether this framing is consistent with premises and conclusions is load-bearing under a technical interpretation of 'review'.
rationale.R1.3: Quantitative claims are specific (78.4% vs 71.2% pass@1; 34/80 vs 21/80 issue resolution). Verifying that these figures are correctly attributed to the right configurations and that the comparisons are fair is central to any credible review of this section.
rationale.R1.6: Under an editorial interpretation of 'review this section,' prose and sentence-level quality is load-bearing. The delegation does not exclude this reading, so writing polish must remain active.
